text.title: Project Closure with Lessons Extraction Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure to produce + carry forward closure.

step.name: kick-off
step.action: Schedule closure interviews; announce closure to stakeholders.

step.name: gather
step.action: Compute variance vs charter; document actual outcome.

step.name: interview
step.action: Run interviews per role; capture lesson candidates.

step.name: synthesise
step.action: Translate each candidate into behaviour-change form; assign owner + target adoption date.

step.name: publish
step.action: Assemble closure report; review with sponsor + team; commit.

step.name: carry-forward
step.action: At next-project kick-off, mark each lesson adopted / partial / abandoned with evidence.
step.decision-gate: Block next-project kick-off without adoption table.
